solutions.title: Solution (awoo)
solutions.content:
import
java
.

.*

()
=
repeat

()!!.
toInt
())
{

=

()!!.
toInt
()

=
readLine
()!!.
split
(
" "
).
map
{
it
.
toInt
()
}
val R
=
readLine
()!!.
split
(
" "
).
map
{
it
.
toInt
()
}
val ord
=
Array
(
n
,
{
i
->
i
})
ord
.
sortWith
({
x
:
Int
,
y
:
Int
->
L
[
x
]
-

[

]})
val ans
=
IntArray
(
n
)
fun check
(

:
Int
,
fl
:

Int
{
val cur
=

<
Int
>(

{

[
it
]
})
var
j
=
0
var
res
=
0
for
(
t
in
m
until
m
+
n
)
{
while
(
j
<
n
&&
L
[
ord
[
j
]]
<=
t
)
{
cur
.
add
(
ord
[
j
])

j
;
}
if
(
cur
.
isEmpty
())
{
res
=
1

}
if
(
R
[
cur
.
peek
()]
<
t
)
{
res
=
-
1
break
}
if
(
fl
)
ans
[
t
-
m
]
=
cur
.
peek
()
+
1
cur
.
poll
()
}
return
res
;
}
var
l
=
1
var
r
=
1e9
.
toInt
()
var
res
=
-
1
while
(
l
<=
r
)
{

=
(

+

)
/
2

=

(

,

(

==
0

=

if
(

==
-
1

=

-
1

=

+
1

}
println
(
res
)
if
(

!=
-
1
)

(

,

.
